name: ESP_ERR_WIFI_NOT_INIT
comment: WiFi driver was not installed by esp_wifi_init

name: ESP_ERR_WIFI_NOT_STARTED
comment: WiFi driver was not started by esp_wifi_start

name: ESP_ERR_WIFI_NOT_STOPPED
comment: WiFi driver was not stopped by esp_wifi_stop

name: ESP_ERR_WIFI_CONN
comment: WiFi internal control block of station or soft-AP error

name: ESP_ERR_WIFI_WAKE_FAIL
comment: WiFi is in sleep state(RF closed) and wakeup fail

name: ESP_ERR_WIFI_POST
comment: Failed to post the event to WiFi task

name: ESP_ERR_WIFI_INIT_STATE
comment: Invalid WiFi state when init/deinit is called

name: ESP_ERR_WIFI_NOT_ASSOC
comment: The WiFi connection is not associated

name: ESP_ERR_WIFI_TWT_SETUP_TIMEOUT
comment: Timeout of receiving twt setup response frame, timeout times can be set during twt setup

name: ESP_ERR_WIFI_TWT_SETUP_REJECT
comment: The twt setup request was rejected by the AP

name: ESP_ERR_MESH_DISCONNECTED
comment: disconnected with parent on station interface

name: ESP_ERR_MESH_NO_PARENT_FOUND
comment: no parent found to join the mesh network

name: ESP_ERR_MESH_NO_ROUTE_FOUND
comment: no route found to forward the packet

name: ESP_ERR_MESH_XON_NO_WINDOW
comment: no window for software flow control on upstream

name: ESP_ERR_MESH_DISCARD_DUPLICATE
comment: discard the packet due to the duplicate sequence number

name: ESP_ERR_MESH_XMIT
comment: TX fail, the tx state is a value other than timeout and disconnect

name: ESP_ERR_MESH_PS
comment: mesh PS is not specified as enable or disable
